problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: If Perovskite crystal structure optimization is applied to instability, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
